calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Oct-27-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Milla Lvovich for (petitioner) Clifford Wong.

The Court stated that we are here on an amended petition, that there are various accounts specifically listed on exhibit A of the trust but not re-titled, that the car had been titled to the trustor at the time but not subsequently retitled, that there is sufficient evidence to satisfy Heggstad conditions and that the court needs a revised order specifically listing those assets. The Court granted the petition for order confirming trust assets (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
